name: @raltic/desktop
author: Raltic
description: Raltic desktop app — embeds the bridge daemon and the web UI in a single tray-resident Electron shell.

scripts.package: node scripts/generate-icons.mjs && electron-vite build && electron-builder --dir --publish never
scripts.package:qa: node scripts/generate-icons.mjs && electron-vite build && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.release: node scripts/release-preflight.mjs && node scripts/generate-icons.mjs && electron-vite build && electron-builder --dir --publish never && node scripts/smoke-launch.mjs && electron-builder --publish always
